urlshortener-qrcode-enabled: Samee URL-yada gaagaaban iyo koodhadhka QR-ka.
urlshortener-action-done: URL-yada waa la tirtiray iyo/ama waa la soo celiyay
urlshortener-approved-domains: Xiriirrada ku jira {{PLURAL:$1|domain-kan|domains-kan}} waa la gaabin karaa: $2.
urlshortener-blocked: Isticmaalayaasha xanniban ma samayn karaan URL-yada gaagaaban.
urlshortener-copy-fail: Ku guuldareystay in URL-ka lagu koobiyeeyo sabuuradda.
urlshortener-desc: Gaabiyaha URL-yada ee URL-yada aan xadidnayn
urlshortener-disabled: Samaynta URL-yada gaagaaban cusub si ku-meel-gaar ah ayaa loo joojiyay.
urlshortener-enter-short-code-delete: Koodhka gaaban ee URL si loo tirtiro
urlshortener-enter-short-code-restore: Koodhka gaaban ee URL si loo soo celiyo
urlshortener-error-badports: URL-yada ay ku jiraan ports lama oggola in la gaabiyo
urlshortener-error-disallowed-url: URL-yada ku socda domain-ka $1 lama oggola in la gaabiyo
urlshortener-error-nouserpass: URL-yada ay ku jiraan username ama password lama oggola in la gaabiyo
urlshortener-failed-try-again: Waa fashilmay. Mar kale isku day?
urlshortener-manage-text:
Isticmaal foomka hoose si aad u tirtirto URL gaaban ama u soo celiso mid la tirtiray.
Kadib marka aad halkaan ka tirtirto URL gaaban, xiriirka gaaban mar dambe uma wareejin doono boggii uu hore ugu wareejin jiray. Dhammaan xiriirrada lagu sameeyay way jabi doonaan. Fadlan si taxaddar leh u isticmaal astaantan. Ficilkan waxaa lagu diiwaangelin doonaa [[Special:Log/urlshortener|diiwaanka]].
urlshortener-manage-not-enough-data: Waxaad u baahan tahay inaad doorato hal koodh gaaban oo URL ah si loo tirtiro ama loo soo celiyo
urlshortener-not-found-message: Waan ka xunnahay, URL-ka aad raadinayso lama helin.
urlshortener-ratelimit: Fadlan sug waqti ka hor intaadan gaabin URL-yada kale.
urlshortener-short-code-is-not-deleted: Koodhka gaaban ee URL lama tirtirin
urlshortener-short-code-not-found: Koodhka gaaban ee URL lama helin ama waa la tirtiray
urlshortener-shortened-url-alt: Waxaad sidoo kale isticmaali kartaa URL-kan kale:
urlshortener-url-too-long: URL-ku aad buu u dheer yahay, cabbirka ugu badan waa {{PLURAL:$1|hal xaraf|$1 xaraf}}
urlshortener-badaccessgroups: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku abuuri karto URL-yada gaagaaban
log-description-urlshortener: Diiwaankan wuxuu muujinayaa tirtiridda iyo soo celinta URL-yada gaagaaban. Ma muujiyo abuurista kuwa cusub
urlshortener-qrcode-downloaded: Koodhka QR-ka waxaa loo soo dejiyay fayl SVG ah
